allow: Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./messages/es.json'\); for \(const k of ['hero','heroIntro','album','quickAccess','members','kami-band','topSongs','upcomingTours','tour']\) { console.log\('['+k+']:', m[k]?Object.keys\(m[k]\).join\(','\):'NO EXISTE'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const t=fs.readFileSync\('./src/constants/tourDates.ts','utf8'\); const dates=\(t.match\(/\\"20[0-9-]{8,10}\\"/g\)||[]\); console.log\('total fechas:', dates.length\); console.log\('rango:', dates.sort\(\)[0], '->', dates.sort\(\).slice\(-1\)[0]\)")

Bash(node -e "const k=require\('./src/constants/kamiband.json'\); const m=Object.values\(k.musicians||{}\); console.log\('Kami Band musicians:', m.length\); console.log\('eastern:', m.filter\(x=>x.faction==='eastern-kami'\).length, '| western:', m.filter\(x=>x.faction==='western-kami'\).length\); console.log\('nombres:', m.map\(x=>x.name\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./messages/es.json'\); console.log\('hero.title:', m.hero.title\); console.log\('album.finalAlbumTitle:', m.album.finalAlbumTitle\); console.log\('album.albumName:', m.album.albumName\)")
